title: Cobblemon Islands
description:
Pokémon in Minecraft! Play the Cobblemon Mod at it's best with this Server Modpack for Cobblemon Islands

The server included in this pack has EVERY Pokemon Model, Megas, Z-Moves, Terastalization, Raids, Expeditions, Dens and more!
